name: Chicken Dressing Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 pkg Stove Top herb flavor, 6 oz
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl and mix well.
2. Transfer the mixture to a greased 13x9 inch dish or pan.
3. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
4. Let stand for 15 minutes before serving. Yield: 8-10 servings.
